revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''砥川'''（とがわ）は[[日本]]の[[河川]]。 *[[砥川 (長野県)]] - [[長野県]]を流れる河川。 *[[砥川 (栃木県)]] - [[栃木県]]を...'
revision.text:
'''砥川'''（とがわ）は[[日本]]の[[河川]]。
*[[砥川 (長野県)]] - [[長野県]]を流れる河川。 *[[砥川 (栃木県)]] - [[栃木県]]を流れる河川。 {{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Togawa''' (砥川) is the name of several rivers across {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}:
* {{ill|Togawa (Tochigi)|ja|砥川 (栃木県)}} – A {{ill|Class A river|ja|一級河川}} and tributary of the {{ill|Itanagawa River|ja|板穴川}}, part of the {{ill|Tonegawa River system|ja|利根川}} in {{ill|Nikkō, Tochigi|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. * {{ill|Togawa (Nagano)|ja|砥川 (長野県)}} – A Class A river in the {{ill|Tenryū River system|ja|天竜川}} ({{ill|Lake Suwa|ja|諏訪湖}}) flowing through {{ill|Shimosuwa, Nagano|ja|下諏訪町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
{{aimai}}

* {{ill|Togawa (Tochigi)|ja|砥川 (栃木県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togawa (Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – A {{ill|Class A river|ja|一級河川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Class A river|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一級水系|1=Classification of rivers in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2908753}} and tributary of the {{ill|Itanagawa River|ja|板穴川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itanagawa River|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, part of the {{ill|Tone River|en|Tone River|WD=Q177452|lt=Tonegawa River system|1=Tone River}} in {{ill|Nikkō|en|Nikkō|WD=Q235753|lt=Nikkō, Tochigi|1=Nikkō}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|WD=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Togawa (Nagano)|ja|砥川 (長野県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togawa (Nagano)|qq=}} – A Class A river in the {{ill|Tenryū River|en|Tenryū River|WD=Q13667|lt=Tenryū River system|1=Tenryū River}} ({{ill|Lake Suwa|en|Lake Suwa|WD=Q1206692|lt=Lake Suwa|1=Lake Suwa}}) flowing through {{ill|Shimosuwa|en|Shimosuwa|WD=Q1204211|lt=Shimosuwa, Nagano|1=Shimosuwa}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.
